texto: My face is set my gait is fast my goal is Heaven my road is narrow my way is rough my companions are few my guide is reliable my mission is clear. I cannot be bought compromised detoured lured away turned back diluted or delayed. I will not flinch in the face of sacrifice hesitate in the presence of adversity negotiate ... at the table of the enemy ponder at the pool of popularity or meander in a maze of mediocrity. I won't give up shut up let up or slow up.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Moorehead sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “My face is set my gait is fast my goal is Heaven my road is narrow my way is rough my companions …” articula superacao, commitment, belief em registro de superacao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e belief.
